name: ChatGPT
description: Official ChatGPT app by OpenAI. Conversational AI for writing, coding, analysis, image generation, voice mode. Syncs history across devices.

pricing.free: GPT-4o (limited), voice mode, image uploads, DALL·E limited
pricing.plus: $20/mo — GPT-4o priority, extended context, advanced data analysis, DALL·E full access
pricing.pro: $200/mo — o1 Pro mode, unlimited access to all tools, extended thinking

web.headline: Get answers. Find inspiration. Be more productive.

top_praise: Versatility — handles everything from creative writing to technical analysis
Productivity impact — users report significant time savings
Reliability — consistently helpful across diverse use cases
Voice mode — natural conversational interface praised
Emotional connection — users describe it as a 'personal assistant' or 'friend'
top_complaints: Model downgrade — repeated user anger over GPT-4o replaced by worse models
Personality changes — AI described as 'lobotomized', dismissive, argumentative
Privacy/ethics concerns — government data sharing concerns driving churn
Plus subscription value — $20/mo feels too expensive for casual users
Memory inconsistency — context not retained as expected
web_themes: Massive community but fragmented across GPT model debates
Strong challenger from Claude, Gemini pulling users away
sentiment.positioning: The AI assistant category leader. Consumer brand recognition unmatched. Vulnerable to model quality perception and trust issues.
